name: MLflow Tracing
description: Export OpenClaw LLM traces to MLflow

enabled.label: Tracing Enabled
enabled.help: Enable MLflow trace export while the plugin is loaded.

trackingUri.label: MLflow Tracking URI
trackingUri.help: Defaults to MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI when not set.

experimentId.label: Experiment ID
experimentId.help: Defaults to MLFLOW_EXPERIMENT_ID when not set.
